---
title: "heimdall_shield.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\src\core\engine\heimdall_shield.py"
loc: 36
complexity: 5
logic_score: 7.35
style_score: 3.84
intel_score: 9.40
overall_score: 5.31
---

## Intent
The `heimdall_shield.py` sector implements modular logic focusing on ShieldTrip, HeimdallShield, __init__, evaluate_command, enforce. It forms a node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via ShieldTrip, HeimdallShield, __init__, evaluate_command, enforce. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 7.3/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 9.4/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 11 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [re](file://re)
- [shlex](file://shlex)
- [typing](file://typing)

### Exports
- `ShieldTrip`
- `HeimdallShield`
- `__init__`
- `evaluate_command`
- `enforce`
